items.name: Sophie M.
items.content: Naya transformed the way I work. I generate protocols in 5 minutes instead of 2 hours. My clients love the mobile portal.

items.name: Marc T.
items.content: The corporate module helped me land my first corporate wellness contract with a 200-person company. The commercial proposal created with Naya was impressive and highly professional.

items.name: Isabelle R.
items.content: My clients re-listen to the audios between sessions. The results are much better and the mood journal lets me track their progress.

items.question: Is Naya GDPR compliant?
items.answer: Yes, fully. Data is hosted in Europe (Supabase EU). Intake forms and health data are encrypted at rest. A GDPR consent model with electronic signature is included. You maintain full control of your data.

items.question: Does Naya make medical diagnoses?
items.answer: No, never. Naya is a guide for structuring treatment plans, not a medical tool. All generated protocols include a clear disclaimer: 'These recommendations are lifestyle advice and do not replace medical advice.'

items.question: Can I use my own branding?
items.answer: Yes, from the Practice plan. You can add your logo, accent color, and tagline. Protocol PDFs and the client portal will reflect your brand identity.

items.question: How does the ElevenLabs voice clone work?
items.answer: On the Practice + Corporate plan, you can record your voice to create a voice clone and generate sophrology/hypnosis audios with your own voice. This feature requires identity verification and explicit consent.

items.question: Can I cancel at any time?
items.answer: Yes, with no commitment or cancellation fees. Your data remains accessible for 30 days after cancellation, giving you time to export it.

items.question: Is the client portal a mobile app?
items.answer: It's a PWA (Progressive Web App): your clients can add it to their home screen like a real app, without going through the App Store. It works on iOS and Android.
